%VERSION  VERSION_STAMP = V0001.000  DATE = 06/30/26
%FLAG POINTERS
%FORMAT(10I8)
       4       1       1       1       0       0       0       0       0       0
%FLAG BONDS_INC_HYDROGEN
%FORMAT(10I8)
       0       3       1
%FLAG BONDS_WITHOUT_HYDROGEN
%FORMAT(10I8)
       6       9       1
%FLAG RESIDUE_LABEL
%FORMAT(20a4)
ALA 
%FLAG MASS
%FORMAT(5E16.8)
  1.00800000
